original_image_tags: Aged, light-brown manila cover sheet for a file folder. Two punch holes are visible along the left edge.

elements.description: Aged brown paper cover with two hole-punches on the left. Features two large, crossed-out 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps (top and bottom center), three crossed-out 'SECRET' stamps (middle horizontal line), a red stamped number '020249 30014', handwritten annotations 'S 78-1(126)', 'P 615', and 'Present 1 35'.

judge.reason: Description B provides extensive, specific quoted text (crossed-out 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps, 'SECRET' stamps, a red stamped number, handwritten annotations) that is entirely absent from the very brief Description A, creating a fundamental contradiction on the presence and content of these visual elements.
